MASTHEAD SHOULD NOT SURVIVE MAIN MODE
NAVIGATION SHOULD NOT SURVIVE MAIN MODE

Generic Container Story

This first long paragraph describes a realistic article stored in generic div elements rather than semantic main or article elements. It contains enough natural prose, punctuation, and sentence structure for a general extractor to distinguish it from short navigation labels around the page.

The second long paragraph continues the narrative with concrete details about preservation. An evidence link, emphasized important wording, and ordinary text must all survive the focused extraction without importing unrelated site furniture.

Supporting detail

A third paragraph supplies additional evidence and ensures this fixture is not accepted merely because of one unusually long opening paragraph. The focused result should remain coherent and structurally useful as Markdown.

FOOTER SHOULD NOT SURVIVE MAIN MODE
